twitter_thread: 40% of gamers use the wrong keyboard switch type, costing them 10-20ms per keystroke
Logitech's G3 series keyboard uses Romer-G switches with 5ms actuation time, but Razer's BlackWidow has 4ms
For FPS games, linear switches like BlackWidow's Razer Orange switches reduce finger fatigue by 30%
Tactile switches like WASD Code 104's Cherry MX Browns increase typing accuracy by 25%
Membrane keyboards have a 50% higher error rate than mechanical keyboards
What's the most important factor for you when choosing a keyboard?
Do you prioritize switch type or keycap quality? #keyboard #gaming
pack.linkedin: Logitech's G3 series keyboard highlights the importance of switch type, with 40% of gamers using the wrong type.
